items.name: Devourer Ascension
items.description: Dark RPG Minecraft mod with custom weapons, abilities, passives, fusion progression, Devourer energy and combat-focused gameplay.

items.name: Tomebound Ascension
items.description: Magic RPG spellbook mod focused on tomes, upgrades, progression, abilities and fantasy combat.

items.name: AetherLuma Cinematic: Cosmic End
items.description: Cinematic Minecraft shader pack with cosmic fantasy colors, stronger atmosphere, glowing visuals and RPG-like mood.

items.name: AetherLuma Lite: Low PC
items.description: Performance-friendly shader pack made for lower-end PCs while keeping a fantasy Minecraft look.

items.name: Enemy Trinket Loot Capped
items.loader: The Binding of Isaac: Repentance / Repentogon
items.description: Isaac mod that adds capped trinket and loot drops from enemies, champions and bosses for a more rewarding run progression.

items.name: Isaac Performance Helper
items.loader: The Binding of Isaac: Repentance / Repentogon
items.description: Small helper mod for The Binding of Isaac focused on smoother gameplay, useful fixes and performance-friendly behavior.

items.name: Universal Completion Board
items.loader: The Binding of Isaac: Repentance / Steam Workshop Ready
items.description: Universal completion board mod prepared for Steam upload, made to track and display completion progress clearly.
